meta.title: The tannin-degrading species Streptococcus gallolyticus and Streptococcus caprinus are subjective synonyms
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The tannin-degrading species Streptococcus gallolyticus and Streptococcus caprinus have been shown to be subjective synonyms on the basis of their levels of 16S rRNA sequence similarity (98.3%) and DNA- DNA homology (> 70%) and the phenotypes of their type strains. S. gallolyticus has nomenclatural priority according to Rule 24b(2) of the International Code of Nomenclature of Bacteria.
